scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend"
scripts.dev:stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports=@(4000,5173,5174); $processIds=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($id in $processIds) { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/frontend
